entry.title: unity
entry.summary:
28 Canvas ProgressBar FillAmount Event -> Script
27 连击动画 attack layer attack1.anim -> finishScript.cs -> OnStateExit() attack2.anim attack3.anim attack4.anim 1->2 bool 2->3 isTrigger 3->4 isTrigger
26 (Virtual)虚拟方法与(abstract)抽象方法的区别? 虚拟方法和抽象方法都可以供派生类重写和都用override重写。那么它们之间有什么区别呢？
抽象方法使用abstract关键字,虚拟方法使用virtual关键字 抽象方法是可以看成是没有实现体的虚拟方法 虚拟方法与多态性关系密切,虚拟方法为子类提供了重写该方法的选项允许...

entry.title: jekyll
entry.summary:
3 facicon Real Favicon Generator
2 ruby gems mirror # 添加镜像源并移除默认源 gem sources --add https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/rubygems/ --remove https://rubygems.org/ # 列出已有源 gem sources -l # 应该只有镜像源一个
1 basic jekyll new blog jekyll server

entry.title: windows
entry.summary:
16 vscodevim ctrl + shift + p keybindings.json { "key": "capslock", "command": "extension.vim_escape" }
15 add gpedit.msc @echo off
pushd "%~dp0"
dir /b C:\Windows\servicing\Packages\Microsoft-Windows-GroupPolicy-ClientExtensions-Package~3*.mum >List.txt

for /f %%i...

entry.title: linux
entry.summary:
82 ssh: connect to host github.com port 22: Operation timed out vi ~/.ssh/config
Host github.com Hostname ssh.github.com Port 443
ssh -T git@github.com
81 aseprite.desktop shortcut $HOME/.local/share/applications/aseprite.desktop
[Desktop Entry] Name=Aseprite Exec=/opt/aseprite/aseprite Terminal=false Icon=/opt/aseprite/data/icons/ase.ico Type=Application
